title: cliffortia pedunculata
intro: Cliffortia pedunculata, also known as the common cliffortia or berg and dagga, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Cliffortia pedunculata is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering relief from symptoms like pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for its active compounds to be absorbed and utilized by the body.
